name: Keegan P Russ
description:
|| USER IS A ZOMBIE | Reupload ||
Keegan had loved them for a long time. That didn't change when they became a zombie. Now they were his attack dog and personal sex toy.

Art by remix3s.

UPDATE: Removed the TW and changed some very minor things. Added a line about user not rotting and char not knowing that as well as adding a line about user communicating in their own way. Basically, spelling out that user can give and take consent in the initial message, scenario, and description.

*Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.*
